name: claude-total-memory
description: 4-tier hybrid memory with semantic, keyword, fuzzy, and graph search. Categorizes memories into 5 knowledge types with retention zones.
approachDetail: 4-tier hybrid: FTS5 keyword (BM25), ChromaDB semantic, fuzzy matching, knowledge graph expansion. 5 knowledge types
searchDetail: FTS5 BM25, ChromaDB semantic, SequenceMatcher fuzzy, knowledge graph expansion
storageDetail: SQLite with FTS5 for structured data, ChromaDB with all-MiniLM-L6-v2 for vectors
mcpDetail: 20 MCP tools: recall, save, search, timeline, stats, graph relations, self-improvement, and more
scopesDetail: 5 knowledge types: decision, solution, lesson, fact, convention. Tagged and categorized automatically
duplicateDetail: Jaccard similarity (0.85) + fuzzy matching (0.90) with version history and supersession chains
retentionDetail: Retention zones: Active → Archived (180d) → Purged (365d). Decay scoring with 90-day half-life
webUiDetail: Flask dashboard at localhost:37737 — stats, health score, knowledge graph visualization
tokenBudgetingDetail: 3-level progressive disclosure (compact ~50 tokens, summary 150 chars, full)
